emails.subject: EOL GTC
emails.body: EOL GTC Tana, Enron Canada Corp. will be offering a Canadian power financial swap on EOL within the next couple of weeks. Can you confirm that the current EOL financial GTC is sufficient for power trades. Thanks! Dianne

emails.subject: EOL GTC
emails.body: EOL GTC Tana, Enron Canada Corp. will be offering a Canadian power financial swap on EOL within the next couple of weeks. Can you confirm that the current EOL financial GTC is sufficient for power trades. Thanks! Dianne

emails.subject: Re: EOL GTC
emails.body: Re: EOL GTC Yes, except for weather, the financial GTC's are designed to cover all energy commodities. Dianne Seib 09/25/2000 03:34 PM
